message:
perf(vdbe): promote IfNot into try_execute_hot_opcode hot-path

Seventh opcode-promotion lever on bd-1dp9.6.2, following AddImm
(64d8ce4d), Copy (20b05a95), SCopy (bd1a49bc), DecrJumpZero
(7b7bd71c), IfPos (27da4f32), and IsNull (9f39eb5d).
`Opcode::IfNot` is the canonical falsy-branch jump — emitted at
~48 production sites driving CASE/COALESCE WHEN-fallthrough,
AND-short-circuit, LIMIT-zero detection, HAVING-skip, and the
second arm of every truthiness probe.  Same family as the
already-promoted IsNull/IfPos/DecrJumpZero — small body
(register read + null-check + truthiness + branch), high call
frequency, dispatch routing cost dominates work cost.

Mirrors the existing main-match arm verbatim, including the
C-SQLite null-as-jump-iff-p3 semantics.  Adds a
`test_if_not_via_hot_path` unit test pinning all four input
classes (truthy → fall through, falsy → jump, NULL with p3=0 →
fall through, NULL with p3=1 → jump) to the hot-path arm via
interleaved AddImm sentinels.  Adds a
`vdbe_pipeline_execute_ifnot` bench arm to pipeline_stages.rs
mirroring the always-taken-jump shape used for IfPos/IsNull
(probe register seeded falsy → jump always taken; each op's p2
target is the immediately-next instruction so execution stays
linear but the real branch body runs).

Win sizes (criterion, p<0.05, 'after' = with promotion vs same
build minus the new hot-path arm; numbers are speedup of the
promoted version):

| variant | pre-promotion | after | Δ throughput |
|---:|---:|---:|---:|
| /64   | 670.24 ns | 495.58 ns | +24.91% |
| /256  | 2.3640 µs | 1.6222 µs | +31.49% |
| /1024 | 9.3953 µs | 6.2904 µs | +32.68% |

Significantly larger than IsNull's +27% at /256 — same surprise
pattern as IfPos.  IfNot's main-match arm sat in a cold position
in the 190-arm match, and the body's `vdbe_real_is_truthy` call
is small enough that dispatch routing dominates; promoting it
shortens the per-op instruction window meaningfully on top of
the expected jump-table-slot savings.

Verified via:
- 5 hot-path unit tests pass (if_not + decr_jump_zero + if_pos +
  is_null + scopy via_hot_path), confirming the new arm is
  observed exactly the same way as its sibling promotions.
- Stash-isolated comparison on the full fsqlite-vdbe lib test
  suite: pre-change baseline 736 pass / 43 fail (pre-existing
  concurrent-agent state); with this change 737 pass / 43 fail.
  Net: +1 test passing (the new if_not_via_hot_path), 0
  regressions, fail count unchanged.
- Built via rch (CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/data/tmp/rch_target_cc2_…).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
